# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for datastore security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: datastore_security

apiVersion: elasticsearch.k8s.elastic.co/v1
kind: Elasticsearch
metadata:
  name: elasticsearch
spec:
  version: 7.10.0
  nodeSets:
    - name: default
      count: 3
      config:
        cluster.name: "elasticsearch"
        node.master: true
        node.data: true
        node.ingest: true
        xpack.security.enabled: true
        xpack.security.transport.ssl.enabled: true
        xpack.security.transport.ssl.keystore.path: /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/elastic-certificates.p12
        xpack.security.transport.ssl.truststore.path: /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/elastic-certificates.p12
      volumeClaimTemplates:
        - metadata:
            name: elasticsearch-data
          spec:
            accessModes: [ "ReadWriteOnce" ]
            resources:
              requests:
                storage: 20Gi

---
apiVersion: elasticsearch.k8s.elastic.co/v1
kind: SnapshotRepository
metadata:
  name: s3-repository
spec:
  type: s3
  settings:
    bucket: my-snapshot-bucket
    region: us-east-1
    access_key_id: my-access-key-id
    secret_access_key: my-secret-access-key

---
apiVersion: elasticsearch.k8s.elastic.co/v1
kind: Snapshot
metadata:
  name: my-snapshot
spec:
  repository: s3-repository
  snapshot: my-snapshot-name
  include_global_state: false
  ignore_unavailable: true
  partial: false

---
apiVersion: elasticsearch.k8s.elastic.co/v1
kind: RestoreSnapshot
metadata:
  name: my-restore
spec:
  repository: s3-repository
  snapshot: my-snapshot-name
  include_global_state: false
  ignore_unavailable: true
  partial: false
